docs.summary: A [text input](https://support.wix.com/en/article/content-manager-adding-and-setting-up-a-text-input) element for capturing small amounts of text on a mobile app.
description: + This API is only relevant to custom widgets built for [Branded Apps](https://www.wix.com/app-builder).
+ This API is in Alpha, and is not yet available to all users.
A text input is configured to receive
[different types of information](https://support.wix.com/en/article/input-settings), such as strings, numbers, or passwords.

docs.summary: Sets or gets the input element's placeholder text.
description: Placeholder text is typically used to provide a
hint to the mobile app visitor of what to enter into a input element that accepts
text. When the mobile app visitor begins to enter text, the placeholder text disappears.

examples.title: Get an input element's placeholder text
Set an input element's placeholder text
